c4:
c4 Payments Platform

Customer is a person
  -pays via-> Web Checkout

Merchant is a person
  -reconciles-> Payments API

Payments Platform is a system

Web Checkout is a container
  tech: React
  -POST charge-> Payments API

Payments API is a container
  tech: Node
  -records-> Ledger
  -screens-> Fraud Service

Ledger is a container is a database
  tech: Postgres

Fraud Service is a container
  tech: Python
c4 Online Bookstore

Customer is a person
  -Browses and buys books-> Bookstore

Admin is a person
  -Manages catalog-> Bookstore

Bookstore is a system
  description: Sells books online
  -Processes payments-> Payment Provider
  ~Sends notifications~> Email Service

Payment Provider is a system is a external
Email Service is a system is a external
c4 Ride-Sharing Platform

Rider is a person
  -Requests rides-> Platform

Driver is a person
  -Accepts and completes rides-> Platform

Platform is a system
  description: Connects riders with drivers
  -Gets routes and ETAs-> Maps Service
  -Processes payments-> Payments Provider

Maps Service is a system is a external
Payments Provider is a system is a external
c4 Hospital Records System

Doctor is a person
  -Views and updates records-> Records System

Patient is a person
  -Views own records-> Records System

Records System is a system
  description: Stores patient medical records
  -Requests test results-> Lab System
  -Verifies coverage-> Insurance Provider

Lab System is a system is a external
Insurance Provider is a system is a external

class Blog Domain Model

User
  + id: int
  + email: text
  + name: text
  -> Post : writes
  -> Comment : writes

Post
  + id: int
  + author_id: int
  + title: text
  + body: text
  -> Comment : has
  -> Tag : tagged with

Comment
  + id: int
  + post_id: int
  + user_id: int
  + body: text

Tag
  + id: int
  + name: text
class Media Library

abstract MediaItem
  + title: string
  + year: int

Book extends MediaItem
  + author: string
  + pages: int

Movie extends MediaItem
  + director: string
  + runtime: int

Album extends MediaItem
  + artist: string
  + tracks: int

Library
  + name: string
  o-- MediaItem
class Shape Hierarchy

abstract Shape
  + area(): number

Circle extends Shape
  + radius: number
  + area(): number

Rectangle extends Shape
  + width: number
  + height: number
  + area(): number

Triangle extends Shape
  + base: number
  + height: number
  + area(): number
class Shopping Cart

Customer
  + name: string
  + email: string
  -> Cart

Cart
  + total: number
  *-- CartItem

CartItem
  + quantity: int
  -> Product

Product
  + name: string
  + price: number

er:
er Blog Schema

User
  id int pk
  email text
  name text
  1-writes-* Post
  1-posts-* Comment

Post
  id int pk
  author_id int fk
  title text
  body text
  1-has-* Comment
  *-tagged-* Tag

Comment
  id int pk
  post_id int fk
  user_id int fk
  body text

Tag
  id int pk
  name text
er E-commerce Schema

customers
  id int pk
  name varchar
  email string unique
  1-places-* orders

orders
  id int pk
  customer_id int fk
  total decimal
  created_at timestamp
  1-contains-* order_items

order_items
  id int pk
  order_id int fk
  product_id int fk
  quantity int
  *-references-1 products

products
  id int pk
  name varchar
  price decimal
  sku string unique
er Library Schema

members
  id int pk
  name varchar
  email string unique
  1-borrows-* loans

books
  id int pk
  title varchar
  author varchar
  isbn string unique
  1-has-* copies

copies
  id int pk
  book_id int fk
  barcode string unique
  1-tracked_in-* loans

loans
  id int pk
  member_id int fk
  copy_id int fk
  due_date timestamp
er University Schema

students
  id int pk
  name varchar
  email string unique
  1-enrolls-* enrollments

courses
  id int pk
  title varchar
  instructor_id int fk
  credits int
  1-has-* enrollments

enrollments
  id int pk
  student_id int fk
  course_id int fk
  grade varchar

instructors
  id int pk
  name varchar
  department varchar
  1-teaches-* courses
flowchart:
flowchart User Login

(Start) -> /Enter credentials/ -> <Valid?>
  -no-> <3 failed attempts?>
    -yes-> [Lock account] -> (End)
    -no-> /Enter credentials/
  -yes-> /Enter 2FA code/ -> <2FA ok?>
    -yes-> [Grant access] -> (End)
    -no-> /Enter 2FA code/
flowchart Support Ticket Handling
(New Ticket) -> [Triage by Severity] -> <Known Issue?>
  -yes-> [Auto-Resolve] -> (Close Ticket)
  -no-> <High Severity?>
    -yes-> [Escalate to Human] -> (Close Ticket)
    -no-> [Resolve Normally] -> (Close Ticket)
flowchart CI/CD Pipeline
(Commit) -> [Run Tests] -> <Tests Pass?>
  -no-> (Stop)
  -yes-> [Build Artifact] -> [Deploy to Staging] -> [Run Smoke Tests] -> <Smoke Pass?>
    -yes-> [Deploy to Production] -> (Done)
    -no-> [Roll Back] -> (Done)
flowchart Returns and Refund Decision
(Return Request) -> <Within Window?>
  -no-> [Deny Return] -> (End)
  -yes-> [Inspect Condition] -> <Condition?>
    -good-> [Issue Refund] -> (End)
    -worn-> [Offer Store Credit] -> (End)
    -damaged-> [Deny Return] -> (End)

sequence:
sequence Checkout Flow
User -Place order-> Web App
Web App -Charge $42.00-> Payment API
Payment API -Authorize-> Bank
Bank -Approved-> Payment API
Payment API -Payment ok-> Web App
Web App -Order confirmed-> User
sequence OAuth Login
Browser -sign in-> App
App -redirect-> IdentityProvider
IdentityProvider -prompt-> User
User -authenticate-> IdentityProvider
IdentityProvider -authorization code-> App
App -exchange code-> IdentityProvider
IdentityProvider -access token-> App
App -signed in-> Browser
sequence Cache-Aside Read
Service -get key-> Redis
Redis -miss-> Service
Service -read value-> Postgres
Postgres -value-> Service
Service -write back-> Redis
Service -return value-> Caller
sequence Food Delivery Order
Customer -submit order-> Dispatch
Dispatch -prepare order-> Restaurant
Dispatch -assign-> Driver
Restaurant -food ready-> Dispatch
Driver -pick up-> Restaurant
Driver -deliver-> Customer

state:
state Order Lifecycle

[*] -> Cart
Cart -checkout-> Pending Payment
Pending Payment -payment ok-> Paid
Pending Payment -payment failed-> Cancelled
Paid -fulfilled-> Shipped
Shipped -received-> Delivered
Paid -refunded-> Cancelled
state Document Review
[*] -> Draft
Draft -submit-> In Review
In Review -request changes-> Changes Requested
Changes Requested -resubmit-> In Review
In Review -approve-> Approved
Approved -publish-> Published
Published -archive-> Archived
Archived -> [*]
state Network Connection
[*] -> Disconnected
Disconnected -connect-> Connecting
Connecting -established-> Connected
Connecting -timeout-> Failed
Connected -drop-> Reconnecting
Reconnecting -restored-> Connected
Reconnecting -give up-> Failed
Failed -retry-> Connecting
Connected -disconnect-> Disconnected
state Support Ticket
[*] -> Open
Open -assign-> In Progress
In Progress -need info-> Waiting on Customer
Waiting on Customer -reply-> In Progress
In Progress -resolve-> Resolved
Resolved -confirm-> Closed
Closed -reopen-> Reopened
Reopened -reassign-> In Progress
